name: Donald J. Trump
subject: 2 years since my Inauguration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
WE have accomplished so much. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8e59b34e1187face7c3c3b810878ee4fecea54c2b186c6c4f39cd21d2d86d486c52c8b6bd2aace2b96abef49af307686710328c0d4fcf2ec)
---

Friend,

Two years ago today I humbly became your President and gave the country back to the American people:
_" January 20th, 2017 will be remembered as the day the people became the rulers of this nation again. The forgotten men and women of our country will be forgotten no longer...America will start winning again, winning like never before."_
Since my inauguration we have seen that no dream is too big for America, regardless of what the Mainstream Media or Liberal Obstructionists say.

Former President Barack H. Obama laughed and said it would take "a magic wand" to reach 4% GDP. **Together, we reached 4.2% GDP.**

The Media mocked us saying OUR policies wouldn't bring back jobs. **Unemployment is now near the lowest since 1969.**

Democrats and the Fake News said OUR tax cuts would crash the economy. **Now, we are seeing historic economic growth.**

Together, we have proven that our country is at its best when it is in YOUR hands, Friend. There is nothing we can't accomplish.

The Democrats and media are desperate and will do anything to gain power in 2020. That's why I need you on my side in this fight, because this is YOUR COUNTRY, not theirs.

| **[Please contribute at least $5 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to become an Official Inauguration Anniversary Member and get on the list my team sends me tonight.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8e59b34e1187faced2027b1278dee5a568c781a9ad13d5c3bc1dcf27f9ad106d89b77b7d05721c392257baef7b280298775887ab8f4e106d)** **[OFFICIAL INAUGURATION ANNIVERSARY MEMBERSHIP](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8e59b34e1187face49c372440c5c2917b1beb375bf726d43aa885fc5f3b11891ba1fd1f28635a31dd978a26b6a297803ac2e6a3895adde0c)** **EMAIL: ** **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=885684512e0bb07eaf3070fc45abc0a03085d0a1716a8f1f23993de9a9210945ae797aed1f3f8d87ddc317500ef83fa6c51ae74bd8fa8f6c)** **ACCOUNT NUMBER: 6124335 - 2019**

Peter,

Today we made it official! I'm running for Congress in the Texas 10th Congressional District. [Here's our highlight video kicking off the 2020 campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4348594/34603962/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2ZkOWI4NS1mNzFjLWU5MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YTQZHsT_OS6KpFANWlny34zBzRKZF9wjvM2zcUgJvtU=&refcode=em12019-1) In 2018, we ran a people-powered campaign that proved this is not a "safe" Republican seat. Instead, this is a true battleground district. In 2020, I am committed to running a winning campaign, one that will reach out to every part of the Texas 10th—across urban, suburban, and rural areas; to every racial, linguistic and religious community—to engage our friends and neighbors in the work of building a stronger democracy. [Help us build a winning campaign by donating today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4348595/34603963/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2ZkOWI4NS1mNzFjLWU5MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YTQZHsT_OS6KpFANWlny34zBzRKZF9wjvM2zcUgJvtU=&refcode=em12019-2). We are going to fight for healthcare for every Texan; to end the racist and wasteful War on Drugs; to combat climate change through a national renewable energy jobs program; and to protect the right to vote by strengthening the Voting Rights Act. We know that to win in a gerrymandered district against a corporate-funded millionaire, we can't stop the work of meeting the people. That is why, with the support of my family, I've committed to campaigning full-time beginning now. [We are building an ambitious campaign that can change the future of Texas politics. We need your help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4348596/34603964/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2ZkOWI4NS1mNzFjLWU5MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YTQZHsT_OS6KpFANWlny34zBzRKZF9wjvM2zcUgJvtU=&refcode=em12019-3) There is too much at stake in Texas and in this country to leave anything on the table. We must elect a Congress that takes decisive action to benefit the American people. Today is the first step in many, and I'm happy to share it with you. [Join us today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4348597/34603965/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2ZkOWI4NS1mNzFjLWU5MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YTQZHsT_OS6KpFANWlny34zBzRKZF9wjvM2zcUgJvtU=&refcode=em12019-4) And thanks for following along. With love and respect, Mike
**[Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4348598/34603966/-1950142826?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2ZkOWI4NS1mNzFjLWU5MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YTQZHsT_OS6KpFANWlny34zBzRKZF9wjvM2zcUgJvtU=) [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4348599/34603967/862725720?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2ZkOWI4NS1mNzFjLWU5MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YTQZHsT_OS6KpFANWlny34zBzRKZF9wjvM2zcUgJvtU=) [Campaign website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4348600/34603968/-1686464446?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2ZkOWI4NS1mNzFjLWU5MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YTQZHsT_OS6KpFANWlny34zBzRKZF9wjvM2zcUgJvtU=) [ActBlue](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4348601/34603969/-1117660545?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2ZkOWI4NS1mNzFjLWU5MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YTQZHsT_OS6KpFANWlny34zBzRKZF9wjvM2zcUgJvtU=)** [ Donate Now ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4348602/34603970/2113572082?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2ZkOWI4NS1mNzFjLWU5MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YTQZHsT_OS6KpFANWlny34zBzRKZF9wjvM2zcUgJvtU=)

clean_body: = Join our team! = or =. Peter, Today we made it official! I'm running for Congress in the Texas 10th Congressional District. In 2018, we ran a people-powered campaign that proved this is not a "safe" Republican seat. Instead, this is a true battleground district. In 2020, I am committed to running a winning campaign, one that will reach out to every part of the Texas 10th—across urban, suburban, and rural areas; to every racial, linguistic and religious community—to engage our friends and neighbors in the work of building a stronger democracy. . We are going to fight for healthcare for every Texan; to end the racist and wasteful War on Drugs; to combat climate change through a national renewable energy jobs program; and to protect the right to vote by strengthening the Voting Rights Act. We know that to win in a gerrymandered district against a corporate-funded millionaire, we can't stop the work of meeting the people. That is why, with the support of my family, I've committed to campaigning full-time beginning now. There is too much at stake in Texas and in this country to leave anything on the table. We must elect a Congress that takes decisive action to benefit the American people. Today is the first step in many, and I'm happy to share it with you. And thanks for following along. With love and respect, Mike = = = = = Paid for by Mike Siegel for Congress: PO Box 2409, Austin, TX 78701.
